fallback.reason: AI TUI proof failed before useful steps; deterministic Expect CLI fallback executed.

commands.command: pnpm exec expect open --browser chromium --wait-until load http://127.0.0.1:3999/dev-kit/tools

pnpm exec expect playwright const bodyText = await page.locator('body').innerText(); const copy = 'Tools show audited automation surfaces available to operators.'; return { url: page.url(), title: await page.title(), bodyPreview: bodyText.trim().slice(0, 800), pass: bodyText.includes(copy), foundCopy: bodyText.includes(copy) }; --snapshot-after --description expect-proof-fallback
